title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
